mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE file_md5 = #{fileMd5} AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_file SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE uploader_id = #{uploaderId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
